product.name: LED Modern Bathroom Light Fixtures, 3-Light 24-Inch Matte Black Vanity Lights for Bathroom Lighting Fixtures Over Mirror, 6000K Cool White 350° Rotatable Wall Lamp
features: 6000K Bright Light: The vanity light only has a bright light of 6000K and cannot be dimmed. Bright lighting is specifically designed for dark environments that do not require frequent brightness adjustments, making it a cost-effective choice for most people

Modern Design: The bathroom light fixtures premium metal frame with frosted acrylic for glare-free diffusion and efficient heat dissipation, in a simple modern matte black finish—perfect for home or commercial bathrooms

Premium LED Driver: Using flicker free light beads with a high color rendering index greater than 90, it can protect the eyes while ensuring true color illumination, making it very suitable for makeup, grooming, and delicate tasks

350° Rotatable: This LED vanity light offers 350° rotation to customize your lighting angles. It features hardwired installation to your home’s standard junction box—both DIY and professional setups can be completed in minutes

Ready-to-Mount: This bathroom vanity light over mirror is a fully assembled indoor wall-mounted light fixture. Mount directly with included hardware—follow instructions to enjoy bright bathroom lighting immediately

Versatile Use: Minimalist bathroom lighting fixtures over mirror fit round/square mirrors. Choose from 24" (3-light) to 48" ( 6-light). Combine multiples for seamless vanity lighting fixtures in large spaces
